query:
SELECT 
  roi.id, roi.receivingOrderId, roi.productId, roi.batch, 
  roi.expectedQuantity, roi.receivedQuantity, roi.tenantId,
  p.sku, p.description, p.unitsPerBox
FROM receivingOrderItems roi
JOIN products p ON p.id = roi.productId
WHERE roi.receivingOrderId = 300001
AND roi.productId = 30008;
